metadata.description: Project name used in resource naming
Owner tag — team or individual responsible for this deployment
Short suffix for globally-unique resource names (ACR, Key Vault, Storage, etc.)
App Service Plan SKU (B2 for staging, P1v2 for prod)
Container image tag to deploy (pipeline passes the build ID; defaults to latest)
PostgreSQL administrator password (supplied by the pipeline from a masked variable group)
Deploy VNet + private endpoints to lock the data tier off the public internet (prod)
Marketplace API base URL the core platform connects to (separate deployment)
Azure region for PostgreSQL Flexible Server. Defaults to location but can be overridden per-environment when the subscription lacks quota in the primary region.
Object ID of the pipeline service principal that seeds Key Vault secrets. Granted Key Vault Secrets Officer so it can write secrets during deployment.
Daily ingestion cap in GB (cost guardrail)
Application Insights connection string (injected into apps)
Log Analytics workspace resource ID (for diagnostic settings)
ACR resource ID (for AcrPull role assignment)
Globally-unique Key Vault name (3-24 chars, alphanumeric + hyphens)
Disable public network access (true in prod — reach via private endpoint)
Key Vault resource ID (for private endpoint)
Globally-unique storage account name (3-24 chars, lowercase alphanumeric)
Blob container name for application uploads
Disable public network access (true in prod — reach via private endpoint)
Storage account resource ID (for RBAC + private endpoint)
Allow public network access with Azure-services firewall rule (staging). False = private only (prod).
Disable public network access (true in prod — reach via private endpoint)
Cosmos account name (pipeline uses this to fetch the connection string)
Cosmos account resource ID (for private endpoint)
Disable public network access (true in prod — reach via private endpoint)
Redis name (pipeline uses this to fetch the primary access key)
App Service regional integration subnet prefix
Private endpoint specs: { name, serviceId, groupId, dnsZoneName }
App Service regional VNet integration subnet ID
VNet resource ID (for private DNS zone VNet links)
SKU name, e.g. B2 (staging) or P1v2 (prod)
App-specific settings (name/value pairs), including Key Vault references
Optional regional VNet integration subnet ID (prod). Empty = no integration.
Keep the app warm (Always On). Not supported on Free/Shared tiers.
IP security restrictions — pass an allow-list to lock inbound traffic. Empty = Azure default (allow all).
Resource ID (for private endpoints and cross-module references)
System-assigned managed identity principal ID (for RBAC)
App-specific settings (name/value pairs), including Key Vault references
Optional regional VNet integration subnet ID (prod). Empty = no integration.
Keep the app warm (Always On). Not supported on Free/Shared tiers.
IP security restrictions — pass an allow-list to lock inbound traffic. Empty = Azure default (allow all).
Resource ID (for private endpoints and cross-module references)
System-assigned managed identity principal ID (for RBAC)

parameters.ipSecurityRestrictions: [if(parameters('deployPrivateNetworking'), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', 'allow-core-vnet', 'priority', 100, 'action', 'Allow', 'vnetSubnetResourceId', reference('networking').outputs.appSubnetId.value, 'description', 'Allow inbound from App Service VNet integration subnet (core app only)'))), createObject('value', createArray()))]
